column10: Sushi is a food from the Japanese culture typically made by putting seafood on top of rice. The rice is made sticky by soaking it in vinegar. Sushi can be made with lots of different ingredients, like how there are lots of different things that can go on pizza. Common ingredients for sushi are: Salmon, Yellowtail, Seaweed, and Imitation Crab Meat.
